plan.title: Fix secretary → binder integration: add transitionEvents support
plan.boundary: Secretary terminal handling → Binder.addEvidence section names
plan.consumer_purpose: Secretary can record transition history and execution events into the Binder during terminal lane finalization

root_causes.hypothesis: Secretary calls binderService.addEvidence() with section names 'transition' and 'event', but Binder's addEvidence switch only recognizes 'transitionEvents' and 'executionEvents' — causing a BinderError('Unknown evidence section') runtime failure during terminal lane finalization
evidence: secretary.ts:462 calls addEvidence(laneId, 'transition', ...) — no 'transition' case in binder.ts switch
secretary.ts:473 calls addEvidence(laneId, 'event', ...) — no 'event' case in binder.ts switch

binder.ts switch (lines 319-357): accepted sections are scoutReports, architecturePlan, criticReviews, approvedPlan, executionEvents, diffSummary, validationResults, redTeamFindings, repairHistory, residualRisks, handoffSummary
Binder interface (line 104): has executionEvents field but no transitionEvents field
createInitialBinder (line 216): initializes executionEvents: [] but not transitionEvents
computeDigest (line 180): includes executionEvents in evidencePayload but not transitionEvents

fixes.description: Add transitionEvents field to Binder interface
fixes.after:
// Execution
  transitionEvents: EventRef[]
  executionEvents: EventRef[]
  diffSummary?: DiffSummary

type_errors: Any code that constructs a Binder without transitionEvents will now fail typecheck

risks: Minimal — field placement is purely additive
All downstream consumers of Binder interface will see the new field

fixes.description: Add case 'transitionEvents' to addEvidence switch statement
fixes.before:
case "executionEvents":
        updated.executionEvents = [...binder.executionEvents, artifact as EventRef]
        break
      case "diffSummary":
fixes.after:
case "executionEvents":
        updated.executionEvents = [...binder.executionEvents, artifact as EventRef]
        break
      case "transitionEvents":
        updated.transitionEvents = [...binder.transitionEvents, artifact as EventRef]
        break
      case "diffSummary":
risks: Same pattern as executionEvents — low risk
Must be added after fix-A (transitionEvents field must exist on Binder)

fixes.before:
scoutReports: binder.scoutReports,
    architecturePlan: binder.architecturePlan,
    criticReviews: binder.criticReviews,
    approvedPlan: binder.approvedPlan,
    executionEvents: binder.executionEvents,
    diffSummary: binder.diffSummary,
fixes.after:
scoutReports: binder.scoutReports,
    architecturePlan: binder.architecturePlan,
    criticReviews: binder.criticReviews,
    approvedPlan: binder.approvedPlan,
    transitionEvents: binder.transitionEvents,
    executionEvents: binder.executionEvents,
    diffSummary: binder.diffSummary,
risks: Digest will change for binders that previously had no transitionEvents — expected and correct
Computing digest before the field exists (if fixes applied out of order) would produce different hashes
Must be applied after fixes A-B (Binder must accept 'transitionEvents' section)
If applied independently, addEvidence will still throw BinderError for unknown section
executionEvents case already exists in the switch — changing 'event' to 'executionEvents' is the correction

plan.rollback_plan: Revert each fix in reverse order. Easily reversible: all six changes are a single line each with no cascading renames.
